brand.name: BookedOnCall
brand.tagline: AI call answering for trades businesses
brand.description: BookedOnCall answers missed calls for trades businesses, captures the customer details you need, and helps book jobs or capture callbacks.

validatedCapabilities: Answers inbound calls for plumbing, HVAC, electrical, painting, flooring, landscaping, and general home-service businesses.
Collects caller name, callback number, address, job details, and service notes.
Can offer appointments when scheduling is enabled and a supported calendar or scheduling tool is connected.
Works with Jobber and Google Calendar for supported scheduling setups.
Delivers a clear call summary and the next step, whether that is a booked appointment or a callback request.
Can send follow-up messages when customer messaging is turned on.

integrations.name: Jobber
integrations.description: Connect Jobber so BookedOnCall fits the scheduling process you already use.

integrations.name: Google Calendar
integrations.description: Connect Google Calendar so BookedOnCall can check availability and book supported appointments.

plans.name: Starter
plans.summary: For owner-operators and growing shops that want missed-call coverage, callback capture, and straightforward setup.
features: AI call answering and lead intake
Callback capture and clean handoff when you want to step in
Appointment booking when scheduling is enabled
Jobber or Google Calendar integration when connected
Call summaries with the next step clearly laid out

plans.name: Pro
plans.summary: For businesses that want more included minutes and a more branded caller experience.
features: AI call answering and lead intake
Callback capture and clean handoff when you want to step in
Appointment booking when scheduling is enabled
Jobber or Google Calendar integration when connected
Call summaries with the next step clearly laid out
Give the assistant a custom name
Customize the greeting and assistant behavior
